visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Alternative List Arrangement
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `arrange_alt` function uses an explicit loop and index checking. Refactor it to use more Pythonic techniques like `itertools.zip_longest` or list comprehensions for a more elegant implementation.

solution.explanation: By using `itertools.zip_longest`, we can easily pair elements from lists of unequal length. The nested list comprehension then flattens these pairs into a single list while filtering out `None` values (placeholders for the shorter list).
